status: PARTIAL — 10A complete, 10B deferred, 10C actual complete / GUE-Poisson pending

phase_10A.description: Multi-prime Berry-Keating correlation — 10 height bands, spacing ratios
phase_10A.methodology: spacing_ratios_min_over_max ∈ (0,1], 100 zeros per band, 98 ratios per band

gue_reference.note: Seed variance range 68.3%–74.2%; detect_patterns baseline NOT comparable to Phase 9C Chavez Transform (32.65%)

phase_10A.verdict: Sub-threshold r=+0.543 (Model B). Positive direction established. Extend to p=13,17 in Phase 11.

gue_diagnostic.explanation: Phase 9C used Chavez Transform (32.65% baseline); Phase 10A used detect_patterns conjugation_symmetry (~71% baseline). Different algorithms, different scale. Both show positive delta (actual>GUE). No contradiction.
gue_diagnostic.seed_variance_confirmed: 5-seed range 68.3–74.2%; single-seed reference valid within ±2.6pp std

phase_10B.reason: 10,000 zeros required; mpmath compute time ~40 min. No synthetic approximation.
options: Run rh_zeros_10k script unattended in terminal tonight

phase_10C.status: PARTIAL — actual zeros complete, GUE/Poisson pending
phase_10C.description: Color Group P-vector direction survey — which projections discriminate GUE from Poisson
phase_10C.methodology: 97 consecutive gap pairs from first 99 zeros, projected onto 8D P-vectors via embed_pair()
phase_10C.p5_anomaly_note: P5 at 64.6% is ~15pp below P1/P2/P4. Matches Phase 8/9 finding. Level-repulsion sensitive direction confirmed.
phase_10C.next_session_instructions:
1. Load all p10c_gue_s{1,2,3}_{P}.npy and p10c_poi_s{1,2,3}_{P}.npy — already computed.
2. Run detect_patterns(conjugation_symmetry) on each (12 GUE + 12 Poisson = 24 calls).
3. Compute per-P mean GUE baseline and per-P mean Poisson baseline.
4. Build discrimination table: actual vs GUE vs Poisson for P1, P2, P4, P5.
5. Key hypothesis: P5 GUE ~52%, P5 Poisson ~78% (from Phase 9A) — P5 is the primary level-repulsion discriminant.
6. Secondary hypothesis: P1/P2/P4 GUE ~same as actual (no discrimination power).

cumulative_records_after_phase10.P5_discriminant: GUE+actual ~52% vs Poisson ~78% (Phase 9A — awaiting Phase 10C confirmation)
